promosToday.heading: Thai credit-card promos today
promosToday.subheading: Every active promo from Thai banks — KTC, SCB, KBank — with real expiry dates, not year-old listicles.
promosToday.empty: No active promos right now — check back within 24 hours.

merchantLookup.heading: Which card wins — per merchant, instantly
merchantLookup.subheading: Ask the direct question: at Starbucks, which card earns most? Get a ranked answer with THB per ฿1,000 spend in one second — no 10-page review.

demo.heading: Try a merchant you use often
demo.body: Type in Thai or English — Loftly ranks cards by actual value at that merchant.
demo.hint: Examples: Starbucks, Grab, Shopee, Lazada, 7-Eleven, Central

why.heading: Why Merchant Lookup changes the game

concrete.title: Numbers, not opinions
concrete.body: At Starbucks → KBank WISDOM · ~฿340/mo at ฿80k spend — every rank comes with real THB.

live.title: Promos refreshed daily
live.body: deal-harvester pulls promos from KTC, SCB, KBank every day — data you see is < 24h old.

bilingual.title: Thai + English
bilingual.body: Read either language — not translated; phrased natively (we don't translate 'KrisFlyer' or 'cashback' into forced Thai).

cta.heading: Which merchant do you use most?
cta.body: Search any merchant in Loftly Merchant Lookup — one-second answer, no sign-up required.

promoIntelligence.heading: Live promos from 3 Thai banks — refreshed daily
promoIntelligence.subheading: deal-harvester pulls 160+ promos/day · AI matches each to cards · THB math personalized to your spend.

harvest.title: Harvest
harvest.body: Crawler pulls promos from KTC, SCB, KBank bank pages several times a day.

canonicalize.title: Canonicalize
canonicalize.body: AI reconciles merchant names (e.g., 'สตาร์บัคส์' = 'Starbucks') so every spelling resolves.

value.title: Value
value.body: Computes THB per ฿1,000 spend using per-currency valuations.

surface.title: Surface
surface.body: Renders on merchant pages, Selector, and /promos-today in real time.

freshness.title: Freshness < 24h
freshness.body: Every promo you see is < 24h old — not a year-old listicle with dead links.

thaiCoverage.title: Thai coverage
thaiCoverage.body: 3 major Thai banks today, scaling to 5 more in Phase 2.

aiReasoning.title: Thai-language AI
aiReasoning.body: Sonnet + Haiku + Typhoon — reasoning that reads as native Thai, not translation.

cta.heading: Let AI pick your top-3 cards
cta.body: Tell us your monthly spend and goal → Loftly picks cards with real THB math. Takes 2 minutes, free.

footer.affiliateNote: Loftly earns a commission when you apply through our links — we rank cards by the numbers, not by what pays us.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This page may have moved, or the URL was typed incorrectly.
notFound.supportText: Think this is a bug? Tell us at {email} — we reply within 24 hours.

serverError.title: Something went wrong
serverError.subtitle: Try reloading this page. If it still fails, please contact us.
serverError.supportText: Contact us at {email} — include the error code above if shown.

heroSearch.statusPill: {count}+ active promos · synced a few minutes ago
heroSearch.subheading: Type a merchant. See the best card, the live promo, and exactly how much THB you earn per ฿1,000.

landing.title: Know which card wins — at every merchant, every day
landing.subtitle: Live Thai credit-card intelligence for every merchant
landing.reassurance: Free · No sign-up · Results in 10 seconds

selectorCta.heading: Or tell us how you spend
selectorCta.body: If you want the whole-stack picture — not just one merchant — enter your monthly spend and goal, and AI picks the three cards that maximize THB for you.
selectorCta.whyGoDeepBody: Selector compares every card in the catalog against currently-active promos. Takes 2 minutes; result is personalized to your spend profile.

personalizedPromos.heading: Promos for you
personalizedPromos.subheading: Live from deal-harvester · ranked by urgency × discount value × freshness
personalizedPromos.rankingFootnote: Auto-ranked · no pay-for-placement · data refreshed hourly from bank sources via deal-harvester

livePromo.title: Live promo data
livePromo.body: Promos from KTC, SCB, and KBank, refreshed daily — freshness < 24h. Not last-year reviews with dead links.

merchantIntel.title: Merchant-level intel
merchantIntel.body: Ask the direct question: which card wins at {merchant}? THB-per-month answer, not a 10-page review.

thaiAi.title: Thai-language AI
thaiAi.body: Reasoning in natural Thai — not translation-smell. Mixes English loanwords (KrisFlyer, cashback, promo) the way Thai readers actually speak.

valuations.indexSubtitle: Loftly samples real redemptions and publishes the 80th percentile — not the mean, not the median.
valuations.notFoundBody: This currency may have been retired, or the URL is misspelled — head back to all 8 currencies.

detail.methodologyBody: We take the 80th percentile across {samples} recent redemptions — the level a deliberate optimizer can reasonably hit, not the average and not the fantasy best-case.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Send promotional emails, new-card news, and partner offers.

sharing.title: Sharing with partners
sharing.description: Share aggregated, anonymized stats with partner banks to inform product design.

account.title: Your account

consent.title: Data consents
consent.desc: Review which data uses you've allowed — optimization, marketing, analytics, partner sharing.

dataExport.title: Download your data
dataExport.desc: Get a JSON + CSV copy of everything we hold on you. PDPA §7 right-to-access, ready in 24h.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.desc: Start the 14-day erasure grace period. You can cancel any time before it completes.

account.loadError: We couldn't load your profile right now — your settings are still accessible below.

dataExport.title: Download your personal data (PDPA)
dataExport.intro: You have the right to a copy of your data under PDPA §7 — we'll package it as JSON + CSV and deliver a download link within 24 hours.
dataExport.notAvailableBody: Self-service data export will be available after the Month 3 soft-launch — in the meantime, contact us for a manual export.
dataExport.errorGeneric: Couldn't submit your request — please try again

delete.title: Delete your account
delete.warningBody: You can cancel any time during the grace period — after 14 days your data is permanently erased per PDPA §7.
delete.emailConfirmLabel: Type your registered email (to confirm identity)
delete.pendingBody: Your data will be erased in
delete.cancelledNotice: Deletion cancelled — your account is active.
delete.completedNotice: Your account has been permanently deleted.
delete.legalHoldBody: Consent records and commission accounting are retained for 7 years per PDPA and accounting regulations.
delete.notAvailableBody: Self-service account deletion will be available after the Month 3 soft-launch — contact us for an early-deletion request.
delete.errorGeneric: Couldn't submit your request — please try again

legal.affiliateDisclosureInline: Loftly earns commission from the bank — no extra cost to you
legal.affiliateDisclosureFull: Loftly earns a commission when you apply for a card through our links, at no extra cost to you. Our current partners include MoneyGuru, KTC, and UOB — we disclose all commercial relationships so you can evaluate our recommendations neutrally. Our analyses and scores are not adjusted in favor of any specific partner.
legal.placeholderNotice: This policy is in draft — the final Thai-localized copy is pending legal review ahead of the Month 3 soft-launch.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Loftly is free while we build — tell us if premium features are worth your while.
pricing.free_tier_description: Every Loftly feature available today, at no cost. No credit card, no sign-up required.
pricing.feature_alerts: Transfer-bonus alerts, pushed within minutes of announcement
pricing.feature_unified_balance: Unified points balance across all your loyalty programs
pricing.feature_api: API access for your own dashboards

page.title: Loftly is invite-only right now
page.subtitle: We're running a closed soft launch with 50 invites per wave. Three ways from here — enter a code, join the waitlist, or follow along until the next wave opens.
